posts.text: Iranian-made drones are changing how wars are fought. To defeat them, the U.S. should look to Ukraine. More from CAP's @robertbenson92 and Luke Zahner for @starsandstripes: tinyurl.com/3w6vnbd7

posts.text: Instead of proposing solutions to the skyrocketing energy prices Americans face as a result of President Trump’s war of choice with Iran, the administration has put forward ideas that benefit the oil and gas industry. ampr.gs/4rql1DT

posts.text: The Medigap trap is a predictable—and reversible—result of policy choices. CAP's new report outlines reforms that would both prevent beneficiaries from falling into the Medigap trap and offer a way out for those already in it. ampr.gs/3OYXV9V

posts.text: Recent dramatic events with the DOD and both Anthropic and OpenAI have shown that private sector attempts to constrain government use of AI is nearly impossible. Congress must act. Learn more: americanprogress.org/article…
